message:
chore: remove binary from repo, update .gitignore

- Remove stockyard-snapshot binary from git tracking
- Add vm-image build artifacts to .gitignore
- Add editor, OS, and local settings to .gitignore

The binary was accidentally committed. It should be built as part
of the build process, not stored in the repo.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,22 @@
 work/
 bin/
 /stockyard
+/stockyardd
 .worktrees/
+
+# VM image build artifacts
+vm-image/output/
+vm-image/scripts/stockyard-snapshot/stockyard-snapshot
+vm-image/scripts/stockyard-shell/stockyard-shell
+
+# Editor/IDE
+.idea/
+.vscode/
+*.swp
+*.swo
+
+# OS files
+.DS_Store
+
+# Local settings
+.claude/settings.local.json
